text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita Taishin! First place goes to<n>Narita
Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She may be petite, but that final sprint<n>of hers
looked more like a demon's!<n>The winner of the
Classic Triple<n>Crown's first race, the Satsuki Sho,
is<n>Narita Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: They're... They're calling my name...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Taishin! Taishin, you were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They're all...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They're all looking at me!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: AAAAAGH!

It's as if all her pent up rage comes<n>out in that
scream.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Do you see me now?! Do you?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What did I tell you?! This is where Ibelong!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey.

I want to heap a mountain of praise<n>on her for
how well she did, but the<n>only thing that comes
from my mouth<n>is a simple greeting.

I feel a little frustrated with myself,<n>but she stops
me before I can try<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I get the feeling you wanna say more.<n>Save it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I can pretty much tell just by the look<n>on your
face.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's good enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What did I say?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, forget it! Come on, it's time to<n>head out.
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text: Taishin...

text_block_list.name: Red-haired Girl
text_block_list.text:
You were so amazing! If you can do it,<n>then
maybe... just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Are you all right? Why are you<n>crying?

Narita Taishin wins the Satsuki Sho.<n>However, this
is just the start of the<n>Triple Crown tour.

It's time to start training for the<n>second crown, the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You were so fast! So, so, SO fast!<n>Gaaaah! I can't
take it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But still!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: There's one race I'll never let you<n>have!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And that's the Japanese Deeerbyyy!
